traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: The bullywug can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Speak with Frogs and Toads
traits.description: The bullywug can communicate simple concepts to frogs and toads when it speaks in Bullywug.

traits.name: Swamp Camouflage
traits.description: The bullywug has Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

traits.name: Standing Leap
traits.description: The bullywug's long jump is up to 20 feet and its high jump is up to 10 feet, with or without a running start.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The bullywug makes two Trident attacks.

actions.name: Trident
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

actions.name: Croaking Command
actions.description: The bullywug lets out a commanding croak. Each bullywug within 30 feet of it can use its reaction to move up to its speed or make one attack.
actions.special: Allies can move or attack as reaction

tactical_info.tactics: Commands other bullywugs, uses croaking command for battlefield control, fights from water when possible
tactical_info.weaknesses: Relies on minions, slow land speed
